requirement_topic.en: Pressure Equipment Directive (PED) 2014/68/EU — Refrigerant Circuit Classification (Ireland / NSAI)
requirement_topic.zh: 压力设备指令（PED）2014/68/EU——制冷剂回路分类（爱尔兰 / NSAI）
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力設備指令（PED）2014/68/EU——制冷劑迴路分類（愛爾蘭 / NSAI）

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU, transposed into Irish law by NSAI, applies to heat pump refrigerant circuits as pressure equipment. Classification depends on fluid group (Group 1 = flammable or toxic refrigerants such as R290; Group 2 = non-flammable, non-toxic refrigerants such as R32 and R410A), maximum allowable pressure, and volume. Category I allows manufacturer self-declaration; Categories II, III, and IV require involvement of a Notified Body. EN 378-2 provides harmonised guidance for refrigerant circuit safety and may be used to support presumption of conformity with PED essential requirements.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU由NSAI转化为爱尔兰国内法，适用于热泵制冷剂回路（视为压力设备）。分类取决于流体组别（第1组=可燃或有毒制冷剂，如R290；第2组=不可燃、无毒制冷剂，如R32和R410A）、最高许用压力及容积。第I类允许制造商自我声明；第II类、第III类和第IV类须引入公告机构。EN 378-2提供制冷剂回路安全的协调标准指导，可用于支持对PED基本要求的符合性推定。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU由NSAI轉化為愛爾蘭國內法，適用於熱泵制冷劑迴路（視為壓力設備）。分類取決於流體組別（第1組=可燃或有毒制冷劑，如R290；第2組=不可燃、無毒制冷劑，如R32和R410A）、最高許用壓力及容積。第I類允許製造商自我聲明；第II類、第III類和第IV類須引入公告機構。EN 378-2提供制冷劑迴路安全的協調標準指導，可用於支持對PED基本要求的符合性推定。

summary.en: TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR) and GB 150-2011 (Pressure vessels) govern pressure vessels in China. SELO (Special Equipment Licensing Office) registration is required for certain pressure vessels. The Chinese risk classification methodology differs from PED: different boundary conditions, different inspection body roles, and SELO registration is not a CE marking or PED Notified Body equivalent.
summary.zh: TSG 21-2016（由市监总局管理的锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程）和GB 150-2011（压力容器）管辖中国境内的压力容器。特定压力容器须向特种设备许可机构（SELO）进行注册。中国风险分类方法与PED不同：边界条件不同、检验机构职能不同，SELO注册并非CE标志或PED公告机构的等效证明。
summary.zht: TSG 21-2016（由市監總局管理的鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程）和GB 150-2011（壓力容器）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。特定壓力容器須向特種設備許可機構（SELO）進行登記。中國風險分類方法與PED不同：邊界條件不同、檢驗機構職能不同，SELO登記並非CE標誌或PED公告機構的等效證明。

gap.en: PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from the Chinese SELO/TSG system. Chinese pressure vessel approvals (TSG/SELO certificates) are not recognised under PED as transposed into Irish law by NSAI. For heat pump circuits classified as PED Category II or higher, a Notified Body listed on the NANDO database must be engaged. Refrigerant circuit re-design or re-certification to PED categories may be required.
gap.zh: PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异。在中国取得的压力容器批准（TSG/SELO证书）在NSAI转化的爱尔兰PED法规下不被认可。对于被分类为PED第II类或更高类别的热泵回路，须引入NANDO数据库列明的公告机构。制冷剂回路可能需要重新设计或按PED类别重新取证。
gap.zht: PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異。在中國取得的壓力容器批准（TSG/SELO證書）在NSAI轉化的愛爾蘭PED法規下不被認可。對於被分類為PED第II類或更高類別的熱泵迴路，須引入NANDO數據庫列明的公告機構。制冷劑迴路可能需要重新設計或按PED類別重新取證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (PED 2014/68/EU as transposed by NSAI — applies to refrigerant circuits meeting pressure/volume thresholds)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (TSG 21/SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

source.publisher: NSAI — National Standards Authority of Ireland

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from Chinese SELO/TSG system; existing Chinese pressure vessel approvals not recognised under PED as applied in Ireland.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异；现有中国压力容器批准在爱尔兰适用的PED法规下不被认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異；現有中國壓力容器批准在愛爾蘭適用的PED法規下不被認可。

requirement_topic.en: F-gas Containment Pressure Testing and EPA Ireland Enforcement
requirement_topic.zh: 氟化气体密封压力测试与爱尔兰环境保护局（EPA）执法
requirement_topic.zht: 氟化氣體密封壓力測試與愛爾蘭環境保護局（EPA）執法

summary.en: EU F-gas Regulation (EU) 2024/573 requires equipment containing fluorinated greenhouse gases to be leak-checked and pressure-tested. In Ireland, EPA Ireland is the competent authority enforcing F-gas obligations under S.I. No. 189 of 2015 (European Union (Fluorinated Greenhouse Gases) Regulations 2015, as amended). Technicians handling F-gas refrigerants during installation, maintenance, or decommissioning must hold EPA-recognised F-gas technician certification (FETAC Level 6 equivalent or City & Guilds 2079). Containment checks must be performed at specified intervals depending on refrigerant charge size.
summary.zh: 欧盟氟化气体法规（EU）2024/573要求含氟化温室气体设备进行泄漏检测和压力测试。在爱尔兰，EPA Ireland是依据S.I. No. 189 of 2015（《2015年欧盟氟化温室气体法规》及其修订版）执行氟化气体义务的主管机构。在安装、维护或报废过程中处理氟化气体制冷剂的技术人员须持有EPA认可的氟化气体技术人员认证（相当于FETAC 6级或City & Guilds 2079）。须根据制冷剂充注量大小，按规定间隔进行密封检查。
summary.zht: 歐盟氟化氣體法規（EU）2024/573要求含氟化溫室氣體設備進行洩漏檢測和壓力測試。在愛爾蘭，EPA Ireland是依據S.I. No. 189 of 2015（《2015年歐盟氟化溫室氣體法規》及其修訂版）執行氟化氣體義務的主管機構。在安裝、維護或報廢過程中處理氟化氣體制冷劑的技術人員須持有EPA認可的氟化氣體技術人員認證（相當於FETAC 6級或City & Guilds 2079）。須根據制冷劑充注量大小，按規定間隔進行密封檢查。

summary.en: HJ 2537 (Technical Specification for Recovery and Recycling of Refrigerants from Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Equipment, MEE China) is the closest Chinese equivalent for refrigerant containment and recovery procedures. China does not have an equivalent FETAC/City & Guilds-style F-gas technician certification system enforced by a national competent authority with the same legal weight as EPA Ireland's scheme.
summary.zh: HJ 2537（制冷和空调设备制冷剂回收与循环使用技术规范，中国生态环境部）是制冷剂密封和回收程序最接近的中国等效标准。中国没有等同于爱尔兰EPA方案、由国家主管机构以同等法律效力执行的FETAC/City & Guilds氟化气体技术人员认证体系。
summary.zht: HJ 2537（制冷和空調設備制冷劑回收與循環使用技術規範，中國生態環境部）是制冷劑密封和回收程序最接近的中國等效標準。中國沒有等同於愛爾蘭EPA方案、由國家主管機構以同等法律效力執行的FETAC/City & Guilds氟化氣體技術人員認證體系。

standards_or_laws: HJ 2537 (MEE China — refrigerant recovery and recycling)

gap.en: Irish installers and service technicians must hold EPA Ireland-recognised F-gas certification (FETAC Level 6 or City & Guilds 2079) — Chinese technician qualifications are not recognised. Equipment must undergo EPA-compliant containment checks post-installation. Chinese F-gas handling practices and documentation do not substitute for Irish EPA enforcement requirements under S.I. No. 189 of 2015.
gap.zh: 爱尔兰安装商和服务技术人员须持有EPA Ireland认可的氟化气体认证（FETAC 6级或City & Guilds 2079）——中国技术人员资质不被认可。设备安装后须进行符合EPA要求的密封检查。中国氟化气体处理实践和文件不能替代S.I. No. 189 of 2015下爱尔兰EPA的执法要求。
gap.zht: 愛爾蘭安裝商和服務技術人員須持有EPA Ireland認可的氟化氣體認證（FETAC 6級或City & Guilds 2079）——中國技術人員資質不被認可。設備安裝後須進行符合EPA要求的密封檢查。中國氟化氣體處理實踐和文件不能替代S.I. No. 189 of 2015下愛爾蘭EPA的執法要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (S.I. No. 189 of 2015 — EPA Ireland enforces F-gas containment and technician certification requirements)
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended/voluntary (HJ 2537 — no equivalent mandatory certification scheme)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — EPA Ireland enforces F-gas containment checks and FETAC/City & Guilds technician certification under S.I. No. 189 of 2015; Chinese technician qualifications and HJ 2537 practices are not recognised as equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——EPA Ireland依据S.I. No. 189 of 2015执行氟化气体密封检查和FETAC/City & Guilds技术人员认证要求；中国技术人员资质和HJ 2537实践不被视为等效。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——EPA Ireland依據S.I. No. 189 of 2015執行氟化氣體密封檢查和FETAC/City & Guilds技術人員認證要求；中國技術人員資質和HJ 2537實踐不被視為等效。
